title: Application of thalidomide and thalidomide derivative
abstract: The invention provides an application of thalidomide or a thalidomide derivative in preparation of a medicine for treating arteriovenous malformation. The invention also provides a pharmaceutical composition comprising thalidomide or the thalidomide derivative, and the pharmaceutical composition is used in treatment of arteriovenous malformation. The invention also provides a method of treating arteriovenous malformation, and the method comprises a step of applying an effective amount of thalidomide or the thalidomide derivative to an individual with requirements.

title: Novel crystalline forms of thalidomide
abstract: The invention relates to novel polymorphic forms of thalidomide and pharmaceutical compositions thereof.
